qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Consider the following statements and about the relational data model: : A relation scheme can have at most one foreign key. : A foreign key in a relation scheme cannot be used to refer to tuples of Which one of the following choices is correct? A. Both and are true B. is true and is false C. is fal

qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Suppose we have a database consisting of the following three relations: The first indicates the hotels each customer visits, the second tells which snacks each hotel serves and last indicates which snacks are liked by each customer. Express the following query in relational algebra: Print the hotels
